name: MeTube
short_description: Web UI for yt-dlp - download videos/audio from YouTube and 1700+ sites.
description: MeTube is a web frontend for yt-dlp that lets you download videos and audio from YouTube and many other sites. It offers a URL queue, format selection, playlist support, download progress, and simple queue management via a clean web UI.
usecases: Download YouTube videos for offline viewing.
Extract audio as MP3 from videos.
